moisture_regime: controlled leaf-surface wetting and simulated rainfall
evidence_title: Starter rice leaf foliar delivery benchmark context
citation: Project-authored starter record for FoliarShield-AI workflow validation; replace with license-compatible public literature or assay data before benchmarking.
claims: rice anchors the agriculturally relevant cereal leaf panel
fast physical labels should precede living-payload assays

moisture_regime: controlled leaf-surface wetting and simulated rainfall

moisture_regime: controlled leaf-surface wetting before simulated field-spray impact
citation: Derived from Jayaprakash et al. Soft Matter 21, 3688-3699 (2025), https://doi.org/10.1039/D4SM01496K, and Song et al. Polymer Testing 93, 106958 (2021), https://doi.org/10.1016/j.polymertesting.2020.106958.
claims: droplet impact videos should quantify rebound suppression and contact-line motion

phenotype_value: high-speed video endpoints defined for impact and retention labels

moisture_regime: standardized spray pass followed by image acquisition before rain challenge
citation: Derived from Jayaprakash et al. Soft Matter 21, 3688-3699 (2025), https://doi.org/10.1039/D4SM01496K, and Tang et al. Nature Communications 14, 6401 (2023), https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-023-41878-3.
claims: coverage images should capture deposited area and coverage uniformity before wash-off
coverage labels are required before living-payload promotion
phenotype_value: spray coverage endpoints defined for retained deposition labels

moisture_regime: defined droplet aging interval followed by calibrated simulated rainfall
evidence_title: Simulated rain and wash-off assay metadata
citation: Derived from Tang et al. Nature Communications 14, 6401 (2023), https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-023-41878-3, and Jayaprakash et al. Soft Matter 21, 3688-3699 (2025), https://doi.org/10.1039/D4SM01496K.
claims: rainfastness assays should compare retained signal before and after calibrated rainfall
runoff labels are needed to separate adhesion from release behavior

moisture_regime: controlled deposition with repeated imaging before and after wash-off challenge
citation: Project-authored assay adapter derived from the FoliarShield nonliving-payload benchmark plan and foliar deposition literature including Jayaprakash et al. Soft Matter 21, 3688-3699 (2025), https://doi.org/10.1039/D4SM01496K.
claims: nonliving fluorescent payloads should provide the first retained-intensity labels
background-corrected retained fraction is a required promotion metric

region: contained laboratory gravimetric or image-based evaporation bench
moisture_regime: controlled humidity and airflow during post-deposition residence measurement
citation: Derived from Lathia et al. Nature Communications 14, 6445 (2023), https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-023-41977-1, and Jayaprakash et al. Soft Matter 21, 3688-3699 (2025), https://doi.org/10.1039/D4SM01496K.

moisture_regime: defined hydration or rinse sampling schedule after foliar deposition
